sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17777" key="au)to/kritos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐτό-κρῐτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">κρίνω</etym>) <sense id="n17777.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">self-interpreted,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κρίσεις ὀνείρων</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:4:72" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.72</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
